code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut sum = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut start = 0
  mut in_tok = false
  while i <= n
    mut is_ws = true
    if i < n
      match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
          is_ws = true
        else
          is_ws = false
        end
      when None
        is_ws = true
      end
    else
      is_ws = true
    end
    if is_ws
      if in_tok
        let tok = string.substring(input, start, i)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          if v > 0
            sum = sum + v * 2
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        in_tok = false
      end
    else
      if not in_tok
        start = i
        in_tok = true
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("result=#{sum}")
end
